arts.ttl: Arsenal learn new price tag for Newcastle ace Alexander Isak
arts.sum: Alexander Isak remains a player in demand, but the Newcastle star is unlikely to be moving to Arsenal after his new transfer fee was revealed. The Swedish attacker is in a rich vain of goalscoring form at the moment, having scored 12 goals in his last 10 games (WhoScored), and provided three assists. arts.ttl: WhoScored's Premier League Team of the Week: Alexander Isak, Amad, Kevin De Bruyne, Bruno Guimaraes
arts.sum: Newcastle are the dominant side in the Premier League Team of the Week following their 3-0 win over Wolves. Manchester United, Crystal Palace, Nottingham Forest, Brighton, Aston Villa, Manchester City...

arts.ttl: Newcastle United shut down Fenerbahce claims after paltry £6m transfer offer
arts.sum: Eddie Howe says that Fenerbahce are the team guilty of turning Lloyd Kelly's head in the January transfer window. The versatile defender has been the subject of a cash bid from the Turkish Super Lig side but the Toon head coach has indicated he has no interest in selling the ex-Bournemouth star - and that he will be in the squad to face his old club on Saturday lunchtime in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Chelsea injury, suspension news and return dates vs. Bournemouth: Fofana, Badiashile, Dewsbury-Hall
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of Chelsea's latest injury and suspension news ahead of Monday's Premier League fixture against Wolverhampton Wanderers.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United issue fitness statement on Fabian Schar and Nick Pope
arts.sum: Speaking ahead of the clash, Eddie Howe said today: "We'll make a decision today. Howe has also confirmed that goalkeeper Nick Pope - who has now been on the sidelines for the last six weeks after a knee injury suffered at Brentford - must wait for his recall to action.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United break silence on emotional departure after hierarchy decision
arts.sum: Howe does not see the situation surrounding Almiron as "ideal" but feels that the club must work within the tight PSR framework they find themselves bound by. Howe, who feels losing a winger would be tough, said: "The latest is we expect him for training today and in the squad tomorrow.

arts.ttl: Premier League Team of the Week – Amad, Murillo, Isak
arts.sum: Our Premier League Team of the Week following the midweek action, featuring Manchester United’s hat-trick hero and Newcastle’s record-chasing frontman. Goalkeeper: Matz Sels – Nottingham Forest After a relatively comfortable first half, Sels was forced into regular action after the break to help Nottingham Forest frustrate Liverpool. arts.ttl: Newcastle United's PIF stadium tweak on show as Saudi backing tops £657m
arts.sum: Toon directors last week issued just one 5p share and paid in £15million into the Magpies' kitty, something which club sources say that PIF have done on a regular basis throughout their ownership. Chronicle Live sources last week were told that PIF's commitment behind the scenes is witnessed pretty much every day at St James' Park down the corridors of power.

arts.ttl: Bournemouth make offer for striker – Cherries need to review bid as agent reveals conditions
arts.sum: Earlier this month, AFC Bournemouth’s Evanilson and Enes Ünal suffered injuries and both are set for prolonged spells on the sidelines. The duo’s setbacks have left Cherries manager Andoni Iraola with Daniel Jebbison as the only recognised striker at his disposal. Last week, the Premier League side recalled him from his loan spell at Watford. The post Bournemouth make offer for striker – Cherries need to review bid as agent reveals conditions appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Sources: Personal terms agreed for Newcastle attacker, negotiations advancing
arts.sum: Miguel Almiron looks finally set to end his Newcastle hell, after it was revealed that the Paraguayan attacker has agreed personal terms with Atlanta United. Sources close to Newcastle have indicated to CaughtOffside that the MLS side are in advanced negotiations for Almiron, with an £8m offer plus add-ons believed to be on the table.
